name: Vexing Vapor (Greater)
description:
Activate 1 Strike

This flask contains a fine red powder made from toxic berries. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls. A greater vexing vapor bomb deals ] damage and )[mental]]{3 mental splash damage}. On a hit, the target must succeed at a check before taking actions with the concentrate trait. This lasts until the end of its next turn (1 minute on a critical hit).
